site.title: Gu Yukai's Blog
site.description: Gu Yukai's personal blog and homepage.

person.name: Gu Yukai
person.location: PhD Student @ Renmin University of China

en.description: A small academic homepage and bilingual research notebook.
intro: I am a PhD student at the Gaoling School of Artificial Intelligence, Renmin University of China. My recent work is around multimodal models, evaluation, inference-time optimization, and research tooling.
Before RUC, I studied computer science at Beijing Jiaotong University and worked on multimodal hallucination evaluation, deep video compression, and open-source productivity tools.

research.title: Inference-time optimization for multimodal models
research.org: AIBOX Lab, Renmin University of China
research.description: Research on using reasoning ability in multimodal tasks and improving test-time behavior of large models.

research.title: Human-machine friendly deep video compression
research.description: Work on deep-model-based video compression and perceptual reconstruction. Related preprint: arXiv:2405.14336.

research.title: Hallucination evaluation for multimodal large models
research.description: Built evaluation code and data for LLM-free multimodal hallucination assessment. Related preprint: arXiv:2311.07397.

research.title: Waypoint
research.description: Contributed features to an open-source software plugin project.

rules: Write pages that survive without a client-side application.
Keep equations close to the prose, for example $V^\pi(s)=\mathbb{E}_\pi[G_t\mid S_t=s]$.
Separate research posts from personal commentary by metadata, not by memory.
Prefer durable links, dates, and source Markdown over clever presentation.

zh.description: 顾俞凯的个人主页和研究博客。
intro: 我是中国人民大学高瓴人工智能学院博士生，近期关注多模态模型、评测、推理阶段优化和研究工具。
此前在北京交通大学学习计算机科学，参与过多模态幻觉评测、深度视频压缩和开源工具相关工作。

research.title: 多模态模型推理阶段的性能优化方法研究
research.org: 中国人民大学 AIBOX 实验室
research.description: 围绕多模态任务中的模型推理能力和测试时行为优化开展研究。

research.title: 人机共友好的深度视频压缩
research.description: 参与深度模型视频压缩和感知重建相关研究。相关预印本：arXiv:2405.14336。

research.title: 多模态大模型的幻觉测定
research.description: 参与 LLM-free 多模态幻觉评测的数据和代码构建。相关预印本：arXiv:2311.07397。

research.title: Waypoint
research.description: 为开源软件插件项目贡献功能代码。

rules: 保持页面简洁、可读、可长期访问。
用博客记录研究问题、论文阅读和实验判断。
